details.redacted_summary: # MEMORY.md - User: ou_4d6506f2fc5e4f989e0672a33d7cc24e - First interaction: 2026-02-26 - User: ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4 - First interaction: 2026-02-27 - 喜欢绿色 - User: ou_2375a992dea28a92946c5e897e37151b - First interaction: 2026-02-27 - User: ou_a690691bd462030c16e4b4c60ae99e2a - First interaction: 2026-02-28 ## 海报设计偏好 (ou_720d005e222d05c44b44dee631ae4dc0) - 风格：清晰明亮，橙色系为主色 - 布局：一页展示完全，不截断 - 不要侧边和底部装饰线条 - 字体字号：标题和内容都要大，由 AI 自主调整 - 要有 emoji / 卡通元素，不要太单调 - 要有设计感和审美，不要死板 ## Technical Issues ### Monitor logs 打开失败 (2026-03-05) - **现象**：`upstream connect error / Connection refused` - **根因**：crabwalk 进程异常退出 - **解决**：检查并重启 crabwalk 进程 ### 飞书机器人不回复，WebUI正常 (2026-04-16) - **现象**：WebUI 后台能正常对话，但飞书私聊/群聊机器人不回复 - **解决**：去 openclaw.chj.cloud → Skills 页面 → 更新飞书插件，然后重启实例 - **来源**：高明达确认，用户李熠柃验证修复

triage.rationale: The summary includes team-scope agent/project operational details plus unredacted individual names and an internal service URL/domain. It is not suitable as safe personal experience without further redaction.
suggested_redactions: Redact unredacted personal names and replace with role-based placeholders.
Redact internal service URLs/domains and plugin/admin navigation details if not intended for release.
Generalize specific incident dates and operational component names where they could reveal internal infrastructure.
Keep Feishu/user identifiers redacted consistently throughout.
triage.release_summary: A bot response issue was observed where the web interface continued to work but chat-platform private and group messages did not receive replies. The reusable fix was to update the chat-platform integration plugin from the administration interface and restart the service instance. A user-side verification confirmed that replies resumed after the update and restart.
triage.reusable_lesson: When a bot works in the web UI but not in chat channels, update the relevant chat integration plugin and restart the instance before deeper debugging.
triage.residual_risk: Underlying plugin failure cause was not captured, so recurrence monitoring is still advised.
